summary: FASE 2 Villa Paris testing complete. All auth, roles & permissions features verified. 34/34 backend tests passed. UI tests for Admin/Worker/Report roles all passed. JWT auth, middleware protection, role-based sidebar, user management page fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Test users created: test_worker_fase2@villaparis.local, test_report_fase2@villaparis.local, ui_test_*@test.local
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 2 JWT auth fully implemented. Admin seed works. Middleware protects all pages except /login. Role-based sidebar hides menus per role. /api/users ADMIN-only. /api/audit and /api/report/* ADMIN/REPORT only. WORKER restricted to calendario/eventi/clienti/menu-base/stampe/appuntamenti APIs.

login_page.details: Login page loads, pre-filled admin credentials, login works, redirects to dashboard

api_auth_login.details: POST /api/auth/login returns user info + sets vp_token cookie. 401 on invalid credentials.

api_auth_me.details: GET /api/auth/me returns current user with id, email, role, isActive. 401 without token.

api_auth_logout.details: POST /api/auth/logout clears vp_token cookie, returns success

middleware_protection.details: Unauthenticated access to /dashboard, /utenti, /calendario, /audit all redirect to /login

role_admin_full_access.details: ADMIN sees all sidebar menus, can access /utenti, /audit, /report, all APIs

role_report_limited.details: REPORT sees all menus except Gestione Utenti, can access /audit and /report, NOT /utenti

role_worker_restricted.details: WORKER sees only Calendario/Eventi/Clienti/Menu Base/Stampe. Redirected from /utenti, /audit, /report to /calendario

api_users_admin_only.details: GET/POST/PATCH /api/users returns 403 for WORKER and REPORT, works for ADMIN

api_audit_admin_report.details: GET /api/audit returns 403 for WORKER, 200 for ADMIN/REPORT

api_report_admin_report.details: GET /api/report/stats and /api/report/azienda.xlsx return 403 for WORKER, 200 for ADMIN/REPORT

user_management_page.details: Create user, change role dropdown, toggle active, reset password buttons all functional

audit_user_modifications.details: GET /api/audit?entityType=USER returns audit logs for user CRUD operations

sidebar_role_based.details: Admin sees 11 menus, Report sees 10 (no Gestione Utenti), Worker sees 5 (Calendario, Eventi, Clienti, Menu Base, Stampe)

ui_verification.login_page: Clean centered card with email/password inputs and Accedi button, pre-filled with admin credentials
ui_verification.admin_dashboard: Full sidebar with all menus, user info shown in sidebar footer and topbar
ui_verification.gestione_utenti: Create user form (email, password, role dropdown), user list with role select, Disattiva/Attiva toggle, Reset password buttons
ui_verification.report_sidebar: All menus except Gestione Utenti visible
